title: galeomma stenolepis
intro: Galeomma stenolepis, also known as the 'Squawroot' or 'American Squawroot', is a type of orchid that belongs to the genus Galeomma. It is used in herbal medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The Squawroot plant is believed to have various health benefits, such as reducing fever, alleviating respiratory issues, and supporting the immune system. It is typically prepared as a tincture, tea, or infusion, and is used in traditional herbal remedies to treat a range of conditions.
